# llms.txt — entry-point manifest for LLM-driven tooling

This is a Portugal real-estate + regulatory-GIS data warehouse.
Stack: Airflow 2.10 + dlt + dbt-postgres + Cosmos + PostGIS + Streamlit/Kepler.gl.

## Read first

- /CLAUDE.md            — project rules + skill routing
- /wiki/CLAUDE.md       — wiki schema (page conventions, ingest/query/lint workflows, write rules)
- /wiki/index.md        — content catalog (start here for any factual question)
- /wiki/overview.md     — 1-page project synthesis

## Per-area routing (Claude Code task→concept routing)

- /pipelines/CLAUDE.md  — task→concept routing for ingestion/scraper/SCD2 work
- /dbt/CLAUDE.md        — task→concept routing for staging/marts work
- /apps/CLAUDE.md       — task→concept routing for Streamlit/Kepler.gl work

## Source of truth

The /wiki/ directory is the project's compounding knowledge layer.
Do not duplicate rules in CLAUDE.md files — the hierarchy is pointer-layer only.
[[wikilinks]] (Obsidian-style) are the canonical cross-link syntax inside wiki/.

## Active phase

Phase 3 (Claude Code + LLM Wiki) shipped via PRs #13-#21.
Phase 4 (CI/CD + bootstrap) — this manifest ships as part of Phase 4.
See /wiki/sprints/sprint-dev-tooling.md for the full 7-Phase roadmap.

## Lint

`make wiki-lint`  — LLM-driven semantic check (Sundays 06:00 launchd + on-demand).
(`make wiki-lint-fast` programmatic linter ships in Phase 7 alongside the structured schema.)
